channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: BLACK MONDAY — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
BLACK MONDAY

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-22 11:07 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62015793
How do you deescalate if you bomb their water and energy plants?

62015796
>>62015789

62015797
>>62015793
You don't, it's pretty clear that they (Israel) want to collapse the state and create Syria 2.0

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62015798
>>62015793
they cant even find a living iranian official to talk to if they wanted to deescalate

62015800
>>62015793
>deescalate
?

62015805
>doomsday predictions
>Reuters

lol

62015814
>>62015793

How do you deescalate after you kill the supreme leader of the country and religion and then kill the daughters of all of the top generals?

62015889
Is what's bad for stock markets good for cryptocurrency markets?

62015891
>>62015814
You surrender unconditionally and pay reparations. Does the trick usually.

62015893
Guys, please, some of you are okay, so just listen.

Be careful shorting. Donaldo Trompetas might just say something 5 minutes before the opening and crush all your shorts. I am shorting myself, btw. Don't forget your stoplosses.

item.title: Day 1670 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M — 3 replies — 8.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Day 1670 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-22 10:51 UTC

OP

Day 1670 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Early replies (first 3)

62015788
>>62015289
cute

62015840
>>62015289
cute

62015879
gay and fucking gay

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Forex — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Forex

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-03-22 11:10 UTC

OP

Can a solo person actually make money forex trading?
I’m not talking about buying all the BS courses/groups/signals etc

Early replies (first 3)

62015890
yes, but why trade forex when you could trade futures/gold?

62015898
>>62015890
Don’t know. Was only wondering because I see so many obvious Instagram scammers who claim to trade forex I was wondering if people actually make money trading it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: I've locked myself out of $900 and I need your help. — 24 replies — 53.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
I've locked myself out of $900 and I need your help.

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-03-22 10:45 UTC

OP

I've locked myself out of $900 and I need your help.

I use this exchange MEXC often as a simple middleman whenever I accept crypto from people in real life. So instead of giving you my address, I give people the address from the exchange and when I withdraw to my personal wallet it comes out of a different wallet so the people I interact with don't see all my tokens, activity, etc. Today I tried this shit and MEXC says I need to confirm my identity. If this was less than $100 I would just forget it but this is $900 so I thought ok fine I will do it. The problem is that they don't accept users from the USA so I was using a VPN and now they want to verify my ID from one of the countries that they accept users from. What do I do? Please I'm not going to be homeless from this but it really hurts to know that I just burned $900 dollars.

Early replies (first 3)

62014397
>>62014384
>I just burned $900

62014403
>>62014384

62014419
Come on is nobody really going to give me some kind of advice? I feel kind of depressed from this.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62014448
>>62014419
Give it back Jamal

62014453
This is not the right basket weaving forum for you if losing 900 Dollars depresses you.

62014462
>>62014384
Do you know somebody in a country from where Mexc accept users that you can trust?
If not, you are never goint to get that money back.
You should not fuck around with the laws when putting cash in one of these iffy exchanges.
Why didnt you use a Us based exchange? Or a metamask wallet?

62014478
>>62014384
be glad its only 900
try to be more careful next time

62014483
>>62014462
most likely because what he's doing is illegal

62014577
>>62014384
That's the MEXC gamble. It works fine on VPN until one day for no apparent reason it'll press you about confirming your identity and then you're fucked. I lost more than that on top of what I lost being a retard using leverage. I take it as a blessing considering had I not been banned, I probably would have added more margin and still have open positions currently as the market crabs. Fuck that site.

62014644
It's a shame we let these govs and companies ever get away with this ID verification shit to this point, isn't it?

62014783
>>62014644
Spain just required all citizens to report everty bit of property they have outside the country. (Land, stocks, cash, crypto,..)

62015121
>>62014462
>>62014483
I'm not doing anything illegal. I already told you the truth. I was using this exchange's wallets as a middle point so that people couldn't track my personal wallet. I bought $900 from a friend today and I gave him this CEX wallet without realizing that MEXC had changed their policies sometime in 2025. The reason I was using MEXC is because they don't require KYC and still let you withdraw like 1 whole bitcoin.

62015137
>>62014384
Stop being a fucking retard, I had the same shit happen to me. You write support email stating that all purchases were made on vacation in Mexico and if they don't let you withdraw you will get your lawyer involved. Its been a long time but mexc doesn't have any rules on people transferring crypto only buying and selling is prohibited for US citizens. Confirm your identity drop and write them that email and they will let you withdraw

62015140
>>62014384
How many times must we say it? Not your keys, not your coins.

62015141
>>62015137
What I meant is that buying crypto is illegal in the USA but not illegal for Americans on mexc so you can be American and buy crypto in Mexico on MEXC
Apologies I'm high as fuck but this worked for me

62015160
>>62015121
monero solves this

62015162
>>62015160
buy an ad.

62015175
>click on a perp dex to see what it's about
>get this message
I'm actually offended, I haven't tried to access shit. Little bitches.

62015216
>>62014384
Didn't you say your friend from another country was the person using it and you you were mistaken that it was you and you submitted his information to help him because he has a hard time with technology, and that he owes you 100% of the crypto in the wallet and is going to send it to your new master wallet as soon as it is unlocked for him by this exchange? I could've swore this was implied earlier?

62015253
>>62014384
Fellow burger here. I had this happen with $47k after rapidly depositing and swapping to xmr and trying to withdraw. I was being hugely retarded but I wasn't aware of better options for xmr at the time and I was fomoing into a parabolic move. They locked the account and it seemed like a hassle so I left the 47k usdt I hadnt yet withdrawn sitting there for 6 months or so. Finally I got around to going through kyc kabuki with them a few weeks ago. It was, as expected, drawn-out and humiliating but at the end they unlocked my acc and I withdrew with no further problems. So just email support, explain you're a burger who didn't know better and go through kyc via email with them. You'll have to live with the spectre of not knowing if theyve sold your kyc data to the darkweb but that's the price you have to pay, unfortunately.

62015297
>>62014462
>>62015141
>>62015216
>>62015253
Thanks to everybody for your advice. I will try to find someone from another country but if I can't then I guess I will email them and tell them I am from America. But won't they freeze my money since I've already made a few trades in the past? I have actually used their exchange in the past to make a few trades, but I very rarely trade on it.

62015310
>>62015297
I made trades into xmr and had several successful withdrawals to my xmr wallet before they froze my acct. They still unfroze me just fine after kabuki theatre had concluded. It probably helped that all my funds originated from a solana wallet I owbed with a ton of obvious shitcoin gains, so the source of my funds was relatively clear and straightforward. If you're getting random deposits from multiple addresses not under your control that might make your situation a lot murkier. Part of my humiliation ritual involved me filming a video of me showing that I controlled the wallet the funds originated from.

62015474
>>62015310
I don't own the wallet that sent the funds to MEXC. My friend owns the wallet and I gave him $900 so he would send the eth to me.

62015875
>>62015310
They let you use the account afterwards or just to withdraw?

item.title: Ugliest Tax Brackets you've ever seen? — 20 replies — 48.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Ugliest Tax Brackets you've ever seen?

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-03-22 10:47 UTC

OP

The worst one I've seen is the USA one. (Though I haven't seen a lot)

Why couldn't you round it off to the nearest 1000??? Does the IRS really need that 12% of $75???

Even the tax rate increases are wack
2, 10, 2, 8, 3, 2 percent jumps?? Bruh
They could have made it increase by 5% each bracket.

Early replies (first 3)

62015190
>>62015186
>Why couldn't you round it off to the nearest 1000?

You really would like to have to pay more money because the IRS decided to be pretty?

62015195
>>62015186
i wish we had this tax bracket, only 22% max under 100k and caps at 37%

62015206
>>62015190
No, I mean round Up

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62015273
>>62015186
look poorfag, you're cattle and you exist to be milked.

62015305
PLUS

I pay 45% income tax, then when I buy something that's another 15% tax.

62015317
>>62015186
It's because of math.
The brackets go up with inflation and inflation numbers are usually in 0.x%

62015320
>>62015195
>37%
That’s almost unfathomable to me as an American honestly. They take 22% from me and give back about a third of that each year and it still stings quite a bit.

62015323
>>62015305
trannies voted for this

62015331
>>62015323
It's hilarious how this canuck goes to work everyday and pay more than half of his money to taxes so the government can give out Gender Affirming Care. Why even participate at that point?

62015618
>>62015273

Everyone gets taxed one way or another.

Not even the rich can run from it, they can lessen it yes, but they cannot avoid it.

It's one of 2 things certain. Death and Taxes.

Might as well make em elegant.

62015660
>>62015618
I want you to know that midwit faggots like you most of all deserve to be taxed to death for posting gay proverbs online, assuming you're even human and not a conversation bot (which would explain the retarded line of reasoning).

62015729
>>62015186
It should actually be a 5% flat-tax starting at $20k.

62015776
>>62015320
i earn minimum wage and i get taxed 30%. it gets much higher than that

62015847
Read it and weep. There are some tax discounts you get based on your income, so people earning under €30k actually don't pay 35% tax, usually less than 10%. If you earn more than €75k you get no discounts and all income above €75k is taxed at almost 50% lmaoo

62015852
>>62015847
This is the Netherlands by the way. Also the €75k start for tax bracket 3 went up to €78k after years of inflation, if they tracked it fairly it should be well into €80k+

62015866
>>62015320
All taxes are stealing, but there is something exceptionally evil about taxing one’s hard earned income. Especially when you consider how the government then gives it all away to scamming foreigners.

62015871
>>62015847
do you at least get lots of free shit with this tax rate?

62015874
>>62015871
Yes, you get lots of free migrants

62015877
>>62015863
At least it is an effective system and simple and free to lodge. Ths top Corporate and personal income rates really should come down by 10pc imo

item.title: OIL TO $150 — 38 replies — 38.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
OIL TO $150

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-03-22 10:13 UTC

OP

Oil is at $98

This is the cheapest its going to get. If you're thinking of going long on oil, this is your signal. Once we liberate the Iranian power plants, every powerplant, refinery, and desalination plant is going to get blown to hell. World oil supply will be reduced for the next decade at least.

This is your only warning.

https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/posts/116269822349947644

Early replies (first 3)

62014848
>>62014841
Anon, your oil long is fucked. You should have sold at the initial spike of 125. It will never get higher than that. You missed the bus and have brought shame upon your village.

62014902
>>62014841
Hey buddy, why dont you look at futures for WTI. Notice a pattern? Why do you think its bouncing off 100 anon? What's Brent doing anon?

62014906
>>62014841
Oil to 200, then 150 is next bottom

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62014963
>>62014841
US govt the biggest international criminal terrorist mafia in the world

62014965
Wtf bros I thought we won already?

62014983
>>62014841
>let's just make iranians die of hunger if their military doesn't allow our oil go through the strait
I thought they did it for the People of Iran? kek

62014987
>>62014983
We did it so they can't have nukes.

62014999
>>62014848
Dream on migger nigger lmao.

62015004
>>62014987
>muh nukes for the 98329273872-th time
sure. it's been, what, 40 years of wanting to destroy the country?

62015006
>>62014841
Why would they have any incentive at all the open the Strait if they cannot sell their own oil?

62015098
>>62014987
You didn't do shit dumb ass. You're a sidelined NEET waiting for the next trump cue to flip the script and pretend you voted for it all along.
I almost want this deranged fucker to actually drop a nuke because at this point that's the only thing that can realistically penetrate the average terminally online migger NEET's bubble.
Trump can send 2 million zogbots into the meat grinder over there and you'll have retards like this guy posting hyperborea war edits from his room

62015100
>>62014954
Who gives a fuck about the price of bitcoin?

62015105
>>62014983
I don't think trump is capable of comprehending second order effects

62015106
>9 pm on a saturday
Love this nigga, he always makes his moves on weekends.

62015109
what's really funny is I was looking at oil last night and it was here and I wa slike "cup and handle"

62015119
>>62015006
They can sell it, they have a pipe going around it. Still selling it to China.

62015133
I'm going all in on oil. I'm already way in, but I'm going all in next week.

62015154
>>62014954
Trust the plan

62015215
>>62014841
All he does is brinksmanship negotiation. It sometimes works, and this just looks like a hail mary attempt at it. He won't do shit and everyone will have forgotten the tweet on Monday. He's looking for an off ramp.

62015265
>>62015133
Based, pico-bottom soon brothers

62015282
>>62014954
That's not a fair depiction of the dump.
Picrel is this past week. That drop at the end was the breaking news.

62015283
Thank god my IBIT iron condor will hit. Get smoked. Retards.

62015361
>>62015282
Bigger dumps incoming.

62015433
>>62014841
Aaaah the usual weekend snp protective crypto destroying goylem tweet..... GIVE ME SUB1500ETH NIGGERS OR. DIE!

62015443
>>62015106
He is the anti-crypto president

62015456
>>62014954
What in the world is a "bit" coin?

62015509
>>62014841
Oil is at 110. And your schizo doomer scenario wont be real as always

62015534
>>62014841
>lets create one of the biggest humanitarian catastrophes in human history, surely that will do the trick!
Is it his original idea, or did Bibi come up with this one? It's simultaneously extremely malicious and extremely retarded so could be both.

62015806
fifa certified him, he's doing everything for peace

62015813
>>62014987
I thought Trump did a perfect attack last year that completely destroyed Iran's nuclear program. Was the big man wrong?

62015826
>>62014902
>What's Brent doing anon?
Grinding up almost every single day for the last few weeks?

62015828
>>62015534
>it’s le Drump’s fault Iran is launching drones into Dubai apartment buildings
Your new leader’s gay and disfigured lol

62015831
>>62015813
You see, it's a Schrödinger's nuclear program, it's both destroyed and two weeks away from producing nukes at the same time

item.title: >world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??! — 54 replies — 34.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
>world go bad gold must always go up >WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!

Open thread • Replies: 54 • Updated: 2026-03-22 09:38 UTC

OP

>world go bad gold must always go up
>WTF WHY GOLD NO GO UP?!??!
Is the most brain dead retarded take imaginable. These retards fail to understand the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.

Early replies (first 3)

62006969
>>62006961
These are the same type of people who bought gamestop btw.

62006976
>>62006969
digits... checked

62006979
>>62006961
Probably a horde of cunts started leveraging themselves long up the ass when the war started.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62009359
the markets are a casino
all you're doing is gambling
the house always wins

62009589
>>62006961
>the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use.
Troll thread

62009613
>gold crashes to the price I last bought at
looks like it's time to buy more

62009655
Economy is fake, take this opportunity to buy more gold because the ones that want to have all the gold wants you to sell it.

62009662
>>62009359
Pretty much, you should know by now who's the house.

62009810
>>62006961
>gold has kept a high value for thousands of years
>goes down a couple of days
>HAH APPARENTLY GOLD IS WORTH EXACTLY ZERO
just go outside for a bit dude

62009821
>>62009589
yeah, before the 1700s, gold was priced at zero because it wasn't use industrially, we all know that!

62011236
>>62006961
It's time to buy,

62011262
Don't zoom out guys its over this is the all time peak for gold

62011311
The obvious answer which nobody is mentioning is that the gold price is being lowered to give banks an opportunity to reacquire physical assets instead of paper assets, in preparation so they don't get margin called, audited, etc. when the inevitable drop happens.

62011335
>>62006961
reminder even the top assets in world can/are easily rugpulled like crypto

62011402
>>62006961
This literally always happens at the beginning of a financial crisis where gold skyrockets. It's because people are retarded and dump their gold to cover their margin calls.
Gold $6000 EOY*
Silver $150 EOY*
Screenshot this.
*at least

62011417
>>62006961
>These retards fail to understand the price of gold is also linked to it's industrial use
lol
gold is saudi's money, they sell oil and buy gold, price go up, when they can't sell oil, they sell gold, price go down

62011427
>>62011335
Anon....
Tell me....

One year ago?

What was Gold and Silver prices?

62011496
what's a good site to buy physical gold/silver?

62011664
>>62011496
>>>/biz/pmg

62012196
>>62006961
>hedge against political instability
What? No, it is a hedge against inflation and currency debasement at best. A physical asset is terrible for hedging against political instability. How do you move it out of a warzone? How about out of a repressive regime?
Retard

62012210
>>62012196
CNBC claims that inflation is what is driving prices lower though.

62012310
>>62012196
Stick a gold coin up your ass. If you stick up 60 silver coins you are a tremendous faggot.

62012611
>>62012210
CNBC are disingenuous and intentionally ignore how the political instability and the need unwind leverage are the reason gold is being sold.

62012673
>>62006961
>cash out all your gold
>yolo into oil
It's retarded but it works. They're probably overleveraged to shit on paper trades

62015367
Orange Man Bad about to turn off Iran's lights
BTC shits the bed like gold did
>the only real inflation hedge has always been bullets after all

62015386
>>62006961
I bought back in 2023. I'm not worried

62015392
>>62006961
gold drops when people know there wont be a rebuilding phase after an apocalypse

62015545
>>62006961
No. I will never buy your useless rocks, retard.

62015709
Price is malleable. Supply is not.

62015716
>>62006961
It doesn’t have to go up.all they have to do is make it unobtainable for normies.
Most normies can barely afford to fill their gas tanks or spend close to as much as the use to a year ago.what make you think they could afford to buy a shiny rock at current prices?

62015768
it's arabs selling their gold because they need cash since they can't reliably sell their oil

62015770
>>62007829
>Anon is jealous of
>>62006969
>Digits

62015784
>>62006961
Because when shtf people sell gold first to pay to have it cleaned up.

item.title: >LOAN FORGIVENESS FOR ME BUT NOT FOR YOU this generation will be the most broke in history. — 33 replies — 30.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
>LOAN FORGIVENESS FOR ME BUT NOT FOR YOU this generation will be the most broke in history.

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-03-22 10:07 UTC

OP

>LOAN FORGIVENESS FOR ME BUT NOT FOR YOU
this generation will be the most broke in history.
who will buy your stocks and crypto now?

Early replies (first 3)

62013196
loans wouldn't be a problem if interest was paid after the principle

literally all loan-related problems are from people upset they've payed $40k and only $4k of that went towards the principle

62013204
>>62013196
How about instead we tell the dumb niggers that get mad at this that the interest is paying astronauts to build a wall in space to protect them from aliens?

62013206
>>62013196
How about we just ban usury (again?)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62013208
>>62013206
if you can convince the libertarians that a 40% interest rate isn't doing anyone any favors then you have my support

62013229
>>62013196
Would that look so much better?

>I paid 200k of my 250k loan but still have to pay 200k in interest after the principal

62013237
>>62012736
the high IQ move is to get on an income driven repayment scheme (RAP or IBR) and choose to manually re-certify your income (i.e., don't use your most recent tax forms) with minimum wage photoshopped pay stubs.

>t-that's illegal!!! you'll get caught!!!!

62013328
>>62012736
>Nooo I took out a loan and signed my name on the contract and everything why am I being expected to honor the contract that's not faaaaaiiiiir
You did it to yourselves. Now grow the fuck up and pay it back.

62013334
>>62013237
The high IQ move would have been to convince the university to give you enough scholarships and fellowships that there was nothing left for you pay.

62013341
>>62013334
it's state dependent. i graduated with a state university (in pennsylvania) with a 3.8 GPA in applied math. never once received a dime of scholarship aid.

62013359
>>62013196
Huh? Extra payments each month should be applied to your principal amount. Mathematically, paying an extra couple hundred here and there actually make a big difference over the life of a loan. As far as total interest goes, anyway.
If your bank is not applying extra money towards principal, you're getting super-jewed. Like, that's a whole other level of usury lol.

62013368
>>62013341
>it's state dependent.
Nope. It's very IQ dependent though. You get offered those scholarships and fellowships in high school. By the time you actually show up to university it's too late, you're already enrolled and paying your own way and they have nothing to gain by throwing money at you. They're an enticement for high IQ prospects, not a reward for studying hard.

62013372
>>62012736
Car salesman here

It won’t matter. Retards will always find a way.
You can try to talk them down to more reasonable purchase (doesn’t matter to me, in fact the cheaper the vehicle usually the better the profit excepting the absolute max platinum super high rollers package).

They won’t hear of it.
They want their AC seats and they will go 20% interest rolling 15k to do it, and they will do it with you or find someone else.

62013377
>>62013359
He's saying he wants all of each payment to go towards the principle. Which he can totally do, but that has to be written into the loan agreement. It's his failure, but that won't stop him from whining about how "unfair" it is that the contract he read and signed is now suddenly not to his particular preferences, rather than simply paying down the principle at an accelerated rate by paying more than the absolute minimum each month Because whining is free and easy and doesn't involve difficult things like adulting.

62013510
>>62013377
Yeah let me just call up the Department of Education and negotiate a unique loan agreement. Some people don't have any good options. Doesn't mean we should let international bankers prey on them.

62013544
>>62013368
no, it's literally dependent on how your state funds public schools. florida, for example, has a very generous and easy to get "bright stars" scholarship. pennsylvania has no such program and comparatively expensive state schools, because they chose to underfund colleges.

what's the deal with kinky haired muttalo zoomers running off their big ugly gorilla lips when they haven't the slightest idea?

62013583
>>62013196
This. Usury has killed mankind. We live in a parasite state and world

62013593
>>62013196
Loans wouldn't be a problem if people didn't take out loans with larger monthly payments than they could afford to pay.
The problem is not the system, the problem is people's financial literacy.
Or lack thereof.

62013624
>>62013593
>Loans wouldn't be a problem if people didn't take out loans with larger monthly payments than they could afford to pay.

this argument is meaningless when you look at how quickly certain fields of study can be "disrupted." software development was almost a sure bet if you weren't retarded. within 5 years it was destroyed by a combination of outsourced indians, AI, corporations funding bootcamps, and the media attracting students. similar things have happened in law, accounting, and pharmacy. similar things are in the works for certain areas of medicine and dentistry.

62013630
>>62013206
Economy slows down without usury.
>heh GOOD
Yeah except all other countries won't be slowed down and your retarded ass country will be lapped and left behind in no time. And then probably raped and conquered and erased from history. It's a doggy dog world

62013635
>>62012736
i don't understand the op pic. is there a point in this screenshot? explain please

62013677
>>62013328
The f35 Iran is blowing up costs 200 billion dollars

62013683
>>62013196
That’s the risk premium of borrowing because too many retards default on their loans.

You’re more than welcome to lend out your own money at a lower interest rate. See how long it takes before you go bankrupt

62013690
>>62013683
They can't default on student loans

62013712
>>62013196
>>62012736
Fafsa loans shouldn'thave interest....
Why do people not understand that ALL FEDERLA FUNDING COMES FROM TAXPAYERS

If you are paying a loan and paying taxes you are being taxed twice. All loans should be either tax write offs or credits lmao. The audacity of a country to create such a fucking up education system, then outsource/insource H1bs to jobs, then say "sorry goy, you gotta be taxed twice".

No one would care about repayment if the system simply acknowledged double taxation is illegal and I will go tea party on your asses if it isn't fixed.

62013713
>>62013208
exterminate lolbergs and trannies, they're 1%~ of the population, then fix the system without freaks and pedos.

>>62013368
t. has a low iq

62014526
>>62013677
oh no guess we're gonna have to close at least 40 Somalian Quality Learing Centers to cover the cost.

62014544
>>62012736
>making up a fake screenshot

62014550
>>62012736
> affordable housing
> good, stable and full time jobs
> government assistance to buy a home
all things we will never see again. a generation took all these things and then pulled up the ladder.

62014584
>>62013206
Quotes and rules about "usury" from ancient sources are irrelevant today because back then there were 0 regulations and every other loan taker repaid by selling one of his children (or himself) into slavery.

62014585
Half of americans make less than 60k a year.

62014832
>>62014584
Your entire nation has been sold into slavery because of usury.

62015505
>>62013510
It's an unsecured loan retard why the fuck would you be getting favorable terms anyways, don't like it don't take the money

62015824
>>62013206
My guy

item.title: HOW TO SAVE MONEY — 18 replies — 15.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
HOW TO SAVE MONEY

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-22 10:04 UTC

OP

Euro here, I commute to work 2km on a bicycle. Never driven a car. I saved a fortune, missed some fun. Inflation is still gonna hit, but at least I dodged that massive bullet.

What do you do to save money?

Early replies (first 3)

62015679
>>62015674
Faggot

62015686
>>62015674
I am going by bus. Same. Time since the city is undrivable at the mornings and. Much cheaper.

62015687
>>62015686
Bus+metro

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62015688
>>62015679
Nope, I'm married to a beautiful woman six years younger than me. I'm also 35 and have zero health problems (no back problems for instance), despite a computer job. And saved a lot of money.

>>62015686
>>62015687
Would you consider cycling? Or too far away?

62015693
>>62015674
where do you live so i can emigrate and claim welfare?

62015695
>>62015693
1. Poland
2. You can't migrate
3. You won't receive welfare, and if you could, you'd starve.
Migrate here if you plan to WORK. Welfare is if you work hard but break your leg, that's what it's for.

62015696
>>62015695
how niggerified or arabified is to the rest of the EU?

62015724
>>62015696
Not much. But it's changing rapidly. When right wing immigrant-hating party was ruling we had the biggest influx of migrants from MENA countries, especially Muslim. Because right wingers are compulsive liars, in every country.
Now that centre-left had taken over the trend slowed down, but didn't stop. Especially now that we're in G20

62015730
>>62015688
Too far and dangerous, there are no cycle roads here.

62015748
>>62015688
>Would you consider cycling? Or too far away?
Cycling depends on the weather. Also I had a knee injury and couldn't cycle for 1 year because my knee was stiff. Cycling advocates never think of the people who can't cycle for health reasons. They need motorized transport. I used buses in that year, and walked longer distances to/from bus stops.

62015752
>>62015674
I live in peru and can commute by bicycle now, too. Thank you euros!

62015756
>>62015674
>What do you do to save money?
No subscriptions, no netflix, no cable tv.
No debt, no interest payments.
Live in my own house and pay no rent (large downpayment, paid down the small mortgage within 5 years)
Drive an old car, have never bought a new car, always buy used (with cash) and keep it for a long time.
Rarely go to restaurants or bars, mostly cook at home with fresh and healthy ingredients.
Do not order stupid shit online. Never order food delivery.

62015757
>>62015752
Do you live in Miraflores, or Villa Maria del Triunfo? Those are the only places I've seen bicycle paths in Peru.

62015759
>>62015757
Villa El Salvador

62015763
>>62015759
Ah yes, those were financed by Germany, I saw it on the page of our embassy in Lima when they were built. I hope our ambassador gets replaced soon, she's on a permanent holiday visiting all the nice places of Peru on our tax money.

62015765
>>62015763
So you are german? Nice, thank you very much and please don't replace her.

62015769
>>62015756
You are me.
I have bought and old house and renovated it totally on my own over the course of 5 years.
Saved probably 200k.
>>62015674
I cheat. I have an ebike. This is hill country here and i am very tired after work. 8km 250 m climb.

Additionally:
10 chickens. Eat table scraps lay 3-4 eggs a day feed is 20 bucks a month in winter.
We cook a lot with the instant pot. Throw the stuff in the instant pot at 10 pm or whenever you have the time, set timer. Finished meal at 1pm. or 2pm whatever it keeps it hot.
Also I have planted a ton of fruit trees and berries, of which I am now starting the reap the rewards. Jostaberry/Greengage/ quince are my best successes in zone 7b.

62015820
>>62015759
VES mentioned
holy based

item.title: USA is removing sanctions on Iranian oil — 51 replies — 12.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
USA is removing sanctions on Iranian oil

Open thread • Replies: 51 • Updated: 2026-03-22 07:05 UTC

OP

This is going to crash the oil market!!!

Early replies (first 3)

62005086
>>62005061
based bussyent

62005090
>>62005061
stupid, they should be forced to sell it to us for $$30 a barrel.

62005101
The message is that they fucked it up so hard they're begging the enemy they want to destroy to sell them OIL lmfao. Sure, faggot, what about a tariff for Amerimutts plus you pay in yuan, sodomite.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62012155
Bro, let us buy your oil so that we can bomb you, bro. We're totally winning, I'm tired of winning, bro, why are you bombing our bases, bro. Please, stop, we're winning, bro.

62012261
>>62005453
>>62012144
Believe it or not...no one really cares about Europe. Europe is a bunch of tourist destinations that play no significant role in the global economy.

What is the biggest European economy? Germany? And they've been nose diving without imports from other nations like Russia and without as big a Chinese market.

62012273
>>62012261
you would have no industry if it wasn't for all the highly technical products you buy from germany, france and netherlands

62012285
>>62005246
We already have venezuela's oil under American custodianship that is also severely hindering the world's trade as well. This is just a 2 week break to let the dust settle before the Russian and Chinese frog is boiled in even hotter water. If Iranian regime change is effectively successful, the United States literally controls the majority of trade. This also has massive implications on the reunification of Taiwan because if the Changs can't fuel their war machine, theyre SOL.

ALTHOUGH what im saying is purely speculative, but if Iran is beaten down enough and the IRGC is out of power, the Ukraine war is also over, due to attrition.

If Russia and China can't get illegal Iranian or Venezuelan oil. It's game over.

62012292
>>62012285
>We already have venezuela's oil under American custodianship that is also severely hindering the world's trade as well
ahahahahahaha. yeah, venezuela will magically fix their non-working oil machinery, re-import their lost expertise, and the shitty venezuelan oil will somehow be refined and distributed in 2 more weeks.

62012296
>>62012292
Thats also a valid assertion given that theyre ran by communists monkeys.

62012444
>>62005061
Trump is the greatest strategist of all time
and by strategist I mean the highest ranked dementia patient of all time

62012471
>>62005061
they're getting desperate

62012484
>>62005061
Wasn't China buying their oil anyway, so this would just mean China could just flip the Iran oil for a profit, what does this do

62012488
>>62012471
>A is the X; B is the Y
Slop detected + opinion discarded

62012490
>>62012471
>gold price will go up because mentally ill, everything-controlling lolbertarian techbros and shit
imagine believing this bullshit lmao

62012498
>>62005206
>what happens
Nukes if they keep going I imagine.

62012504
This reeks of sheer desperation.

62012787
>>62012471
This is some grade-A quality schizo theory and I love it.

62012801
>>62005061
this is meaningless rhetoric and I'm tired of this blatantly bullshit market manipulation every fucking week
the oil was only sanctioned to NATOcucks and Iran got their money in Chinese bank accounts which orange niggers couldn't touch even if he rimmed Netanyahu on an emergency broadcast
no NATOcuck country is going to touch Iranian oil and it will still flow to China so what he's saying is essentially "uhh don't worry guys we won't blow their oil up we know how fucked up things are" which is like NO FUCKING SHIT
I'm so fucking tired of this retarded nigger administration

62013223
>>62005061
Hahahaha these fucking clowns

62013268
I still think nothing ever happens and it'll be okay but Iran and their backers have the once in a generation opportunity to really kick america HARD in the balls

It remains to be seen whether they will want to take it

62013281
>>62005061
it happened yesterday OFAC lifted the restriction through an announcment on their site

62013287
>>62012498
That's not going to bring the oil back

62013304
>>62005061
They are just scared of China involving itself in the war using Iran as a proxy.

62013322
>>62005061
hmmm
maybe they're preparing for taking that island and using that oil

62013373
>>62005061
The goals of the war in iran:
1) Help russia by making oil expensive
2) hurt europe and usa

62013850
>>62012471
This is just fucking dumb and stupid. You'd have to be retarded to believe this is all true.

62013878
>>62012292
what does venezuela need to fix? globocorp can build the infrastructure, and the mcdonalds or amazon private army can be contracted to defend it - or the nypd

62013905
>>62005101
They're not saying they're going to buy it I don't think. They're just not going to put sanctions on other countries for buying it.

62013971
>>62012471
we need to ban aislop posters

62013977
>>62013878
oh yeah, globocorp will rebuild the infra in 2 weeks, and they will do so just because orange man told them "we control their oil!", as if that meant the US will keep control of their oil forever (or for at least 2 more weeks until the next latin american caudillo comes, nationalizes the oil and tells the US to fuck off and die)

62014076
>>62013304
>Its a proxy war between Israel and China, with USA and Iran as the proxies.
I wouldnt have imagined this in 2025

62015085
>>62005061
how come they want to kill the population? they told us the bombs would help the iranian people defeat the regime

62015596
>>62012261
The whole reason why Trump went to politics is because he started seething when europeans told him on twitter how they have higher living quality than americans despite not worshipping billionaires like him. The american elite know thst europe is everything.

item.title: Still Selling BTC? Big Mistake — 56 replies — 11.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Still Selling BTC? Big Mistake

Open thread • Replies: 56 • Updated: 2026-03-22 06:12 UTC

OP

I’ve been telling folks here not to sell BTC and now they’re buying at the top.

>When are you gonna learn your lesson, folks? HODL

Early replies (first 3)

61996853
>>61996755
rich kid but black

61996883
>>61996853
What's the problem?

61998635
>>61996755
Sell and wait for 10k per btc

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62003430
>>61996755
Let the goyim deal in the crypto world.

62003444
>>62003136
“Anonymous system” lol. It’s literally built around cryptographic guarantees, not trust. APR is low, sure, but better than nothing. This isn’t sending BTC to some random yield farm.

62003448
>>61998652
He's a great kiddo

62003660
>>62003430
Bitcoin keeps improving. Lightning, Taproot, and other upgrades make BTC faster, cheaper, and more usable, confidence grows, price follows.

62003668
Market sentiment drives crypto hard. A little media buzz, some whales buying, and suddenly BTC is pumping. FOMO is real.

62003679
>>62003444
The only defi right now is ethereum

62003695
>>62003117
Whats your price target?

62003910
>>62003679
“Only Ethereum” is outdated. Solana and Sui already have real DeFi, and BTC is just getting started. Most of it is still sleeping, not because it can’t be used.

62003914
>>62003111
Smart guy for buying the dip

62004044
>>61996755
I am blaming Trump for cryoto dumps

62004059
your president is greedy ass

62004175
>>61996755
>Buy XRP and LINK instead

62004400
>>61996755
I need you guys to pump my vaporware up over $96,000 so that I can make my exit. you guys know how this works, so don't play dumb. your exit will come at some point in the future, trust the plan.

62005462
>>62003660
I guess you know better than I do.

62006331
>>62003668
You mean manipulation?

62006772
>>62004400
buy memecoins and enjoy

62007988
>>62004044
You mean the ongoing war conflict? I didn't sign up for that

62008412
>>62003910
How are we making money there?

62008424
>>61996755
BUY ICP

62008434
>>62008412
it's risky. Don't ever try

62010261
>>62008412
You can stake your BTC there natively. If you want more, better wait for their upcoming Trustless Bitcoin Vaults, they’ll open use cases like lending and more.
>>62008434
Risky how? You even know what you’re talking about?

62010279
>>62006772
Which memecoins? Lol

62010288
>>62004400
Then trust your plan ser

62010298
>>62008424
This coin is not really giving me profits

62010313
I've been DCAing since we dumped

62010369
That's right saar do not redeem the BTC 100k again very soon

62012799
>>62010313
That's nice ser

62013543
>>62010369
More than 100k saar

62014517
>>61998635
Not visible, its better to hold and DCA on the way down, most anon are staking BTC now instead of selling

62015469
>>62014517
A better choice for bitcoiners

62008763

62008812

62008870

item.title: Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore. — 24 replies — 10.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore.

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-03-22 08:48 UTC

OP

Nobody wants to buy NYC mansions or townhomes anymore.
>at the $15 million and up price point the preference is doorman style apartment buildings, especially if this is a residence and not an investment
Why?

Early replies (first 3)

62013834
Tartaria..

62013851
>>62013830
All the ultra luxury housing in NY is speculative investment. No one lives in those fancy new high rises much less in these "mansions".

62013855
why don't the sellers lower the price

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62013874
>nobody wants to buy
Plenty of people want to buy, they just don't want to lower the price
>I know what I have

62014099
>>62013830
>live in NYC mansion
>ride subway to get anywhere
>get stabbed by monkeys
If you have money there are 15 million better places to live.

62014132
why are people not lining up for the nyc mansions? do they truly prefer 300sqft studios?
it's hard to understand people. a mystery really

62014160
>>62013830
Panic room sure was a movie.

62014163
Security.

62014169
>>62013830
It surprises me that anyone with enough money to see a world outside of New York City would still willingly live there, much less spend millions on these mansions... Does a 1,000 acre ranch in the midwest not meet their homeless nigger per square foot quota? Maybe not enough literal garbage and piss smells to feel like home? I really don't get these "people."

62014184
For people with that much money, jurisdiction matters more than location.

62014197
>>62013830
Give me $50M and I'll buy one

62014199
>>62014169
rich liberals love the hustle and the bustle
doubt theres any bums loitering around there

62014207
>>62014197
If someone gives you $50M now, you will try to gamble it on shitcoins, you know, to double it. And lose it all to a DEX scam.

62014208
>>62014169
>>62014099
Trying to decide if I want to explain or if I just trust my instincts that these are Israeli glowies.

62014566
>>62013830
> old
> over priced
> falling apart
> require substantial renovations
> cheaper and better options available pretty much anywhere else
> crowded, high property tax area
it really is a mystery isn't it?

62014594
>>62013830
jew york city filled with niggers and high taxes, they'd be better off bulldozing that garbage.

62014750
>>62014208
Niggers ruin everything with violence and retardation.
There are many niggers in nyc.
Do the math, faggot

62014765
>>62013830
N.

62015476
NYC is a brasil-level shithole to europeans these days. We’d rather livd in the hustle and bustle of our own european cities.

62015477
>>62014099
Yeah exactly, to european standards the metro is fucking ancient and in a very decayed condition.

62015485
>>62014199
Read >>62015476 there are way better cities for hustle and bustle these days. Somehow despite americans living in hyper violent cities with poor infrastructure, their night life is pretty tame and behind in trends compared to europe’s big cities.

62015603
>>62013830
looks like some gangbangers could easily kill you with a driveby shooting and you already put a target on your back buying it

62015736
>>62013874
This, likely. Boomers are in denial that no one can afford their overpriced real estate.

62015742
New york city is really, really crowded. It's hard to move around, either walking, driving, or subway. With that swell comes a lot of noise, dirt, and unpleasant encounters with foreigners.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 89 replies — 7.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 89 • Updated: 2026-03-21 23:19 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61984449
>>61984446
>dot sucks
That's great. Women suck too, that's why we love them. DOT is really good at sucking, it'll give you the best BJ

61986812
Tomorrow the inflation will actually drop

61990080
>>61986812

61992305
>>61990080
It's still going up

61992626
>>61992305
ETF flows. New buyers. Selling is slowing. Holy shit. Become a DOThead

61993232
>>61992626
The ETF inflows are kind of mid though https://www.21shares.com/en-us/products-us/tdot. Only 11.5m$, doesn't really affect the mcap too much really, but oh well. It's a start. More ETFs will be coming out

61995431
The golden bull run might have just started. How are we feeling?

61995436
>>61995431
good when return @ 6$

61996036
>>61993232
Can't expect a massive inflow like BTC. Had a decent pump already.

The technicals look stable. Advice. Jump in now while you can

61997405
100$ end of bull run

61997626
Just bought in, life savings. When does it hit $10?

61998660
>>61932834

This shit is going to 100 dollars isnt it

61998672
>>61997626
Oh shit anon. We should've told you that if YOU buy then it's going to 0$. You should sell and then after you sell we'll GIGA ULTRA MEGA PUMP to 100$+

61998866
>>61998660
Yes. Yes it is

61999089
>>61998866
Did you buy?

62000247
>>61999089
Of course. 100 DOT holder reporting in

62000433
>>62000247
It's over guys. This guy doomed us. Because he bought it's going to 0$. Please sell before I put my DOT into my cars brakes.

62004150
>>62000247
The moment you bough the whole market started dumping.

62007000
100$ end of bull run. Is it possible to keep the thread alive for 1 full month? 15 days to go!

62007009
How much are they paying you jeets to post here?

62007046
>>62007009
Well... The question is... How much do you want to get paid to jeet like we do? We can easily mog your jobs salary. JEETMAXXING

62007254
>>62007009
Zero. Plus im white

62008295
>>62007254
Good one dear fren Rajakesh Pujakistan. That'll convince him. Now post your white hand with a timestamp. Picrel is me and my white hand sar

62010139
So... When's JAM coming out guys? Those fuckers stopped doing the monthly development calls

62010191
>>62010139
If you're not a bot, here's a question: why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.

62010262
>>62010191
I'm really glad you brought that up anon. Great question! And if I want to answer it properly, like you deserve, my good sar, then I'll need a bit more information
>why constantly humiliate yourself in public like this? It's embarrassing. Nobody cares about the pedochain and Gayvin.
What do you mean by constantly humiliate myself? Can you help me understand that

62011878
100$ end of bull run

62014468
You did notice that the activity is actually up by a large % since Acurast launched their corechains (https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily), right guys?

62014587
>>62010191
False rumor about Gavin

item.title: GOLD RUGGED — 69 replies — 5.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
GOLD RUGGED

Open thread • Replies: 69 • Updated: 2026-03-21 23:15 UTC

OP

GOLD RUGGED
O
L
D

R
U
G
G
E
D

Early replies (first 3)

61998901
Bitcoin too! Wtf is going on!?

61998912
>>61998888
based quads

61998913
Intense bombings that are destroying crucial infrastructure + FED conference in a few hours. It was obvious

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62003865
>>61998901
Look at the volatility on the stock market, with oil moving within a 10% span every day and shit like that.
People are selling their paper gold so they can gamble on the potentially more profitable shit.

62003963
Babbys first red week

62004017
why the fuck is gold dumping? i'm guessing leveraged niggers are deleveraging?
I mean the world is on the brink of collapse why would you dump gold now

62004022
>>62004017
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4hVZOfRW67M

62004042
>>61998888

me finna buy here

62004048
>>62003435
>Texas Tea
Also known as gomutra.

62004272
Just sold everything.

It's over bros. I feels so dumb..

62004291
>>62004017
Dude people are so fucking dumb. "Duhhhhh gold is a safe haven so that means it has to go up when I want it to".
